title: Membangun Dashboard CRUD yang Scalable
excerpt: Catatan teknis tentang arsitektur API, validasi data, dan UX admin panel yang maintainable.
excerpt_en: Technical notes on API architecture, data validation, and maintainable admin panel UX.
content: Artikel ini membahas pola struktur API modular, validasi payload, audit log, dan strategi workflow draft-review-publish agar dashboard tetap scalable saat fitur bertambah.
content_en: This article covers modular API structure patterns, payload validation, audit logs, and draft-review-publish workflows to keep dashboards scalable as features grow.

title: Next.js App Router untuk Portfolio Modern
title_en: Next.js App Router for Modern Portfolios
excerpt: Strategi struktur halaman, SEO metadata route, dan performa animasi di production.
excerpt_en: Page structuring strategies, route-level SEO metadata, and production animation performance.
content: Kita akan melihat bagaimana segment routing, metadata dinamis, dan optimasi komponen client/server menghasilkan website portfolio yang cepat, rapi, dan mudah dikembangkan.
content_en: We will explore how segment routing, dynamic metadata, and client/server component optimization produce fast, clean, and extensible portfolio websites.

title: Integrasi AI Agents pada Produk Nyata
title_en: Integrating AI Agents into Real Products
excerpt: Praktik implementasi agen AI yang aman, terukur, dan relevan untuk use-case bisnis.
excerpt_en: Practical implementation of AI agents that is safe, measurable, and relevant for business use cases.
content: Mulai dari pemilihan task, guardrail, evaluasi kualitas output, hingga observability, artikel ini merangkum langkah implementasi AI agent agar benar-benar menghasilkan value.
content_en: From task selection and guardrails to output quality evaluation and observability, this article summarizes implementation steps for AI agents that deliver real value.
